news.paragraph: Microsoft is navigating legal scrutiny following trial testimony regarding its massive $100 billion investment in OpenAI and potential overdependence on the partnership. While some market sentiment remains positive regarding its AI holdings, traders should also consider the impact of job cuts at LinkedIn and recent insider trimming. These legal and structural developments may introduce volatility as the market evaluates the company's long-term AI strategy and capital commitments.
headlines: Microsoft Feared Overdependence on OpenAI, Trial Testimony Shows
